name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 14 Jun 2022
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release contains two new enhancements that will help you analyze and segment your contacts based on whether they have Apple’s Mail Privacy Protection (MPP) enabled or disabled."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For details, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" ","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENTS","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Tracking Email Opens Based on Apple’s Mail Privacy Protection Feature","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In the Open reports, you’ll be able to identify which opens originated from Apple devices and whether their Mail Privacy Protection feature had been enabled or disabled."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Apple MPP Enabled","bold":true},{"text":" indicates an Apple device with Mail Privacy Protection (MPP) turned ON."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Apple MPP Disabled","bold":true},{"text":" indicates an Apple device with Mail Privacy Protection (MPP) turned OFF."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": Marketing Cloud identifies an Open as"},{"text":" ","italic":true},{"text":"MPP Open if it comes from a generic user agent of 'Mozilla/5.0' and an IP address that is associated with a known Apple Datacenter (Akamai or Cloudflare)."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more information, see the 'Open Report and Click Report' section in "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Campaign-Report-Dashboard","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Campaign Report - Dashboard","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OpenReportMPPInfo.0685g000008LDgpAAG.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OpenReportMPPInfo.0685g000008LDgpAAG.png","name":"Open Report - MPP Info","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1890,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Segmenting Contacts Based on Apple’s Mail Privacy Protection Feature","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now segment your contacts that opened your campaigns based on whether they have Apple’s Mail Privacy Protection (MPP) enabled or disabled."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Use the following filtering options that have been introduced in the “Opened” criteria:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"All Opens"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"MPP Enabled"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"MPP Disabled"}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": These MPP-based filtering options can only be used with 'Today', 'Anytime', 'In Past', 'Timeframe', 'Campaign', and 'Campaign Tag' filtering options."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more information, see the 'Opened' section in "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Segment-Rules","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Segment Rules","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SegmentsOpenedMPP.0685g000008LDgfAAG.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SegmentsOpenedMPP.0685g000008LDgfAAG.png","name":"Segments-Opened-MPP","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1250,"width":2560}}]}]
